data.description:
Time: bonus
Range:
Self
Components: V
Duration: Concentration, up to minute
A measure of the likelihood of an event occurring, typically expressed as a percentage or a probability.

of spell, willing can hidden safe detection the
for
duration. you the and the

or
divination
spells.

You create an invisible magical sensor in range that extends up to 100 feet from you and lasts until you dismiss it or until someone finds and destroys the sensor. As long as the sensor remains, you can use your action to see, hear, and speak through it as if you were there.
Components: M(jade worth least 1,500 gp), V,S. You place your hand on a jade circlet that must be on your head in order to cast the spell. Duration: Concentration, up to 1 hour.
